title: Aa mandonii
taxonomy: Aa mandonii is a species of orchid in the subtribe Maxillariinae. It belongs to the genus Aa, which is a small and poorly understood group of terrestrial orchids. Aa mandonii is native to the tropical regions of South America, specifically in Peru and Ecuador. The classification of Aa mandonii is still being researched and studied by botanists. As a result, some sources may group Aa mandonii differently, but it is generally accepted to be a member of the orchid family, Orchidaceae.
